title: Jon D'Agostino
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Jon}}
{{Image|person}}
'''Jon D'Agostino''' ([[June 13]], [[1939]] to [[November 28]], [[2010]]) was the inker for several [[Star Wars comic books|comic books]], including nine issues of [[Marvel Comics]]' [[Ewoks (Marvel)|''Ewoks'']] series and one issue of [[Star Wars: Droids (1986)|''Star Wars: Droids'']].

{{Bio-stub}}
